notes: Anonymous *U282: 42 identical 5-vertex LWPOLYLINEs on plan INSUL layer — insulation fill fragment, not wall outlines.

rationale.evidence: Every entity is LWPOLYLINE with vertices=5 on the single bound-xref layer X-평면도(기본형)$0$INSUL (handles 7F54–7F71 sampled). The $INSUL suffix names thermal insulation under a 평면도 parent, and histograms are 100% LWPOLYLINE/INSUL with no LINE, TEXT, INSERT, or HATCH. Contiguous anonymous *U geometry of uniform closed quads reads as insulation fill cut from the floor plan.
rationale.rule: Classify anonymous *U blocks of uniform small closed polylines confined to a floor-plan material sub-layer (INSUL) as 평면 부분도 material graphics; do not treat them as wall-line carriers, 심볼, 치수캐시, or 가구.
rationale.counterfactual: If the layer were WALL/벽체 with long parallel 2-point edges, wall_likelihood would rise and wall_line_handles could be populated; a FURN/가구 token or *D plus SOLID/MTEXT would flip role to 가구 or 치수캐시.
rationale.uncertainty: No vertex coordinates or LINE-derived bbox are given, so size, wall-cavity vs hatch-cell shape, and exterior vs party-wall placement cannot be measured from this projection alone.
